title: Bridge Essay: The imprint of dissociative seizures on the brain.
concept: Free will — sense of agency, voluntary action, intentional binding, volitional control.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Free will — sense of agency, voluntary action, intentional binding, volitional control.

**The imprint of dissociative seizures on the brain.** - Neuroimage Clin (2024). DOI: 10.1016/j.nicl.2024.103664. PMID: 39226702. BACKGROUND: Increased resting state functional connectivity between regions involved in emotion control with regions with other specializations, e.g. motor control (emotional hyperconnectivity) is one of the most consistent imaging findings in persons suffering from dissociative seizures (DS). The overall goal of this study was to better characterize DS-related emotional hyperconnectivity using dynamic resting state analysis combined with brainstem volumetry to investigate 1.
